https://aka.ms/vscode-powershell

PS C:\Users\HiH8e\OneDrive\Desktop\Mirai-Source-Code-master> Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 11434      

ComputerName     : localhost
RemoteAddress    : ::1
RemotePort       : 11434
InterfaceAlias   : Loopback Pseudo-Interface 1
SourceAddress    : ::1
TcpTestSucceeded : True

PS C:\Users\HiH8e\OneDrive\Desktop\Mirai-Source-Code-master> Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:11434/api/generate -Method POST -Body (@{model="dummy";prompt="ping"} | ConvertTo-Json) -ContentType 'application/json'
Invoke-RestMethod: 
{
  "error": "model \u0027dummy\u0027 not found"
}
PS C:\Users\HiH8e\OneDrive\Desktop\Mirai-Source-Code-master>
'
